title: Legacy001 RealMLP epochs 5 to 8
summary: Increase RealMLP training epochs in legacy-001 from 5 to 8 as a single-parameter micro-sweep.
rationale: The root RealMLP may be slightly undertrained. Testing a modest epoch increase isolates whether longer neural training improves the same feature pipeline before adding seeds, extra experts, or stacking.
implementation_hint: Start from legacy-001.py. Change only the RealMLP epoch count from the parent value, expected to be 5, to 8. Preserve all features, folds, random seeds, ensemble size, architecture, outputs, and validation protocol.
expected_effect: Improve OOF AUC if the root RealMLP is underfit at the current epoch count.
risk: Longer training can overfit or just increase runtime without useful gain.
